title: Enchantment Harmony
description: Let the Enchanted Book solve the mutex according to the player's custom configuration
body:
Overview
Enchantment Harmony is a Minecraft mod that liberates the enchantment system from traditional constraints, offering players the freedom to customize enchantment compatibilities through an intuitive configuration file. This mod empowers you to shape your gameplay experience by creating unique equipment setups tailored to your strategies and preferences.

Key Features
Configurable Enchantments: Easily adjust which enchantments can coexist using the mod's configuration file, allowing for a personalized gaming experience.
Strategic Customization: With the ability to define enchantment interactions, you can optimize your gear for specific challenges and playstyles.
Flexible Gameplay: Enchantment Harmony supports a broad range of enchantment combinations, fostering a more flexible and dynamic Minecraft experience.
User-Friendly Configuration: The configuration file is designed to be accessible, enabling players to modify enchantment compatibilities without coding knowledge.
Usage
Installation: Simply place the Enchantment Harmony mod file into your Minecraft mods folder.
Customization: Navigate to the mod's configuration file to set your desired enchantment compatibilities. The file is straightforward, ensuring easy adjustments for all players.
In-Game: Post-configuration, combine enchantments at the enchantment table or with enchanted books, following your customized rules.
Compatibility
Designed with compatibility in mind, Enchantment Harmony works seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft and a multitude of other mods. However, due to its nature of altering core game mechanics, testing in a clean game environment is advised for optimal compatibility.

Updates and Support
We are dedicated to keeping Enchantment Harmony current with the latest Minecraft updates and to resolving any issues promptly. For any problems or suggestions, please engage with us on our official forum or community page.

Conclusion
Enchantment Harmony provides a distinct modding experience by putting the control of enchantment customization directly into your hands. We hope you enjoy the freedom to mold your Minecraft world to your liking. Venture forth and uncover the endless possibilities that Enchantment Harmony offers!
